      calc

            ≤ marcinkiewiczZygmundConst (2 * m) *

              have hnonneg :

                exact integral_nonneg (by

                    exact sum_nonneg (by
                      intro i hi; exact sq_nonneg _)) _)
              exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right hconst hnonneg
        _ ≤ marcinkiewiczZygmundConst (2 * m) * ∫ (ω : Ω), (∑ i ∈ A, ‖X i ω‖ ^ 2) ^ m ∂μ := by
          have hnorm :
              ∫ (ω : Ω × Ω), (∑ i ∈ A, ‖X' i ω‖ ^ 2) ^ m ∂μ.prod μ ≤
                (2 : ℝ) ^ (m : ℝ) *
                  ∫ (ω : Ω), (∑ i ∈ A, ‖X i ω‖ ^ 2) ^ m ∂μ := by
            have hpoint :

                  nlinarith [sq_nonneg (‖X i (Prod.fst ω)‖ - ‖X i (Prod.snd ω)‖)]

                    2 * (∑ i ∈ A, ‖X i (Prod.fst ω)‖ ^ 2 + ∑ i ∈ A, ‖X i (Prod.snd ω)‖ ^ 2) := by
                have :
                    ∑ i ∈ A, ‖X' i ω‖ ^ 2 ≤

                  exact sum_le_sum (by

                pow_le_pow_of_le_left (by

                  (2 : ℝ) ^ (m : ℝ) *

                    ≤ᵐ[μ.prod μ]

                have hb : 0 ≤ ∑ i ∈ A, ‖X i (Prod.snd ω)‖ ^ 2 := by

          have hmul :

              exact this)
          -- absorb the extra factor into the constant definition
          simpa [marcinkiewiczZygmundConst, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, pow_mul] using hmul
